rss.title: New video game console aims to get kids moving
rss.snippet: The cube-shaped console will cost £269 (€319) when it is released on 22 June in the UK and Ireland.

rss.title: UK's top data and AI regulator quits after 'inappropriate' humour
rss.snippet: Edwards has been the boss of the data watchdog since January 2022, and said he had made inappropriate attempts at humour.

arxiv_papers.title: Calibrating Urban Traffic Simulation from Sparse Road Observations via Genetic Optimization
arxiv_papers.snippet: Urban traffic simulation is a critical tool for infrastructure planning, including the placement of electric vehicle charging stations. arxiv_papers.title: Generative AI impacts on intra-urban inequality and skill premium in Beijing
arxiv_papers.snippet: Generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) is the first automation wave to reach high-cognitive tasks at scale, yet its effects on intra-urban inequality remain largely unknown. podcast: [How to raise kids who question AI | Randi Williams] AI education researcher Randi Williams has spent years studying how kids interact with technology and toys, and what she's found should make every parent stop and think. She reveals how, as tech companies embed AI inside toys, children are forming strong emotional bonds with machines.
